samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages. The output result is available on the result port, and the o_en = 1 indicates the availability of the result.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="N">4</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg>reg_i_en[3:0]</reg> : 
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <update> 
                    if (~rst_n) = 0; 
                    else if (i_en) = 1; 
                    else = 0;
                </update>
                <description>Enable signal for addition operation.</description>
            </reg>
            <reg>reg_i_en_shift[3:0]</reg> : 
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <update> 
                    if (~rst_n) = 0; 
                    else if (reg_i_en[3]) = 1; 
                    else = 0;
                </update>
                <description>Enable signal for addition operation.</description>
            </reg>
            <reg>reg_i_en_shift2[3:0]</reg> : 
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <update> 
                    if (~rst_n) = 0; 
                    else if (reg_i_en_shift[3]) = 1; 
                    else = 0;
                </update>
                <description>Enable signal for addition operation.</description>
            </reg>
            <reg>reg_i_en_shift3[3:0]</reg> : 
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <update> 
                    if (~rst_n) = 0; 
                    else if (reg_i_en_shift2[3]) = 1; 
                    else = 0;
                </update>
                <description>Enable signal for addition operation.</description>
            </reg>
            <reg>reg_adda[63:0]</reg> : 
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <update> 
                    if (~rst_n) = 0; 
                    else if (reg_i_en[3]) = adda;
                </update>
                <description>64-bit input operand A.</description>
            </reg>
            <reg>reg_addb[63:0]</reg> : 
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <update> 
                    if (~rst_n) = 0; 
                    else if (reg_i_en[3]) = addb;
                </update>
                <description>64-bit input operand B.</description>
            </reg>
            <reg>reg_carry[63:0]</reg> : 
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <update> 
                    if (~rst_n) = 0; 
                    else if (reg_i_en[3]) = carry;
                </update>
                <description>64-bit input operand B.</description>
            </reg>
            <reg>reg_result[64:0]</reg> : 
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <update> 
                    if (~rst_n) = 0; 
                    else if (reg_i_en[3]) = carry;
                </update>
                <description>64-bit input operand B.</description>
            </reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <assign>sum[0] = adda[0] ^ addb[0] ^ reg_carry[0];</assign>
            <assign>carry[0] = (adda[0] & addb[0]) | ((adda[0] ^ addb[0]) & reg_carry[0]);</assign>
            <assign>sum[1] = adda[1] ^ addb[1] ^ reg_carry[1];
            carry[1] = (adda[1] & addb[1]) | ((adda[1] ^ addb[1]) & reg_carry[1]);
            sum[2] = adda[2] ^ addb[2] ^ reg_carry[2];
            carry[2] = (adda[2] & addb[2]) | ((adda[2] ^ addb[2]) & reg_carry[2]);
            sum[3] = adda[3] ^ addb[3] ^ reg_carry[3];
            carry[3] = (adda[3] & addb[3]) | ((adda[3] ^ addb[3]) & reg_carry[3]);
            sum[4] = adda[4] ^ addb[4] ^ reg_carry[4];
            carry[4] = (adda[4] & addb[4]) | ((adda[4] ^ addb[4]) & reg_carry[4]);
            sum[5] = adda[5] ^ addb[5] ^ reg_carry[5];
            carry[5] = (adda[5] & addb[5]) | ((adda[5] ^ addb[5]) & reg_carry[5]);
            sum[6] = adda[6] ^ addb[6] ^ reg_carry[6];
            carry[6] = (adda[6] & addb[6]) | ((adda[6] ^ addb[6]) & reg_carry[6]);
            sum[7] = adda[7] ^ addb[7] ^ reg_carry[7];
            carry[7] = (adda[7] & addb[7]) | ((adda[7] ^ addb[7]) & reg_carry[7]);
            sum[8] = adda[8] ^ addb[8] ^ reg_carry[8];
            carry[8] = (adda[8] & addb[8]) | ((adda[8] ^ addb[8]) & reg_carry[8]);
            sum[9] = adda[9] ^ addb[9] ^ reg_carry[9];
            carry[9] = (adda[9] & addb[9]) | ((adda[9] ^ addb[9]) & reg_carry[9]);
            sum[10] = adda[10] ^ addb[10] ^ reg_carry[10];
            carry[10] = (adda[10] & addb[10]) | ((adda[10] ^ addb[10]) & reg_carry[10]);
            sum[11] = adda[11] ^ addb[11] ^ reg_carry[11];
            carry[11] = (adda[11] & addb[11]) | ((adda[11] ^ addb[11]) & reg_carry[11]);
            sum[12] = adda[12] ^ addb[12] ^ reg_carry[12];
            carry[12] = (adda[12] & addb[12]) | ((adda[12] ^ addb[12]) & reg_carry[12]);
            sum[13] = adda[13] ^ addb[13] ^ reg_carry[13];
            carry[13] = (adda[13] & addb[13]) | ((adda[13] ^ addb[13]) & reg_carry[13]);
            sum[14] = adda[14] ^ addb[14] ^ reg_carry[14];
            carry[14] = (adda[14] & addb[14]) | ((adda[14] ^ addb[14]) & reg_carry[14]);
            sum[15] = adda[15] ^ addb[15] ^ reg_carry[15];
            carry[15] = (adda[15] & addb[15]) | ((adda[15] ^ addb[15]) & reg_carry[15]);
            sum[16] = adda[16] ^ addb[16] ^ reg_carry[16];
            carry[16] = (adda[16] & addb[16]) | ((adda[16] ^ addb[16]) & reg_carry[16]);
